personal.name: Joakim Moléni
personal.title: Software Engineer — Core Banking & Mainframe Systems

profile: Experienced engineer working with mission-critical mainframe systems and cross-platform integrations. Strong background in transaction processing, reliability, and operational excellence.

highlights: Development and maintenance of high-availability core banking systems on IBM z/OS
Implementation of transaction logic in COBOL and HLASM within regulated financial infrastructure
Operational responsibility and reliability improvements across critical financial processes
Backend development within banking systems supporting core financial processes
System integration and operational support across Linux and distributed environments
